homePage.heroTitle: Thank you for your hard work today, my CS Superhero! 🦸‍♀️
homePage.heroSubtitle: I know handling tickets and upgrade paths every day is exhausting, so I built this little helper just for you. Hope it chases away the boring tasks so you can finish work earlier and spend time with me! ✨
homePage.valuesTitle: ✨ How I Can Help You Today

aiPolish.title: 🔮 Magic Translator
aiPolish.desc: Turn confusing developer logs into polite, clear public announcements with just one click. No more scratching your head over copywriting!

riskFree.title: 🛡️ Guardian Checklist
riskFree.desc: I've listed all the environment checks (IP vs. EJ) for you. Never worry about deployment misfires or tiny mistakes again!

smartExtract.title: 🤖 Smart Path Splitter
smartExtract.desc: Just paste the messy raw path block, and I will automatically organize it into clean Web and App fields with perfect prefixes!

homePage.featuresMainDesc: Bilingual, structured release-note generator covering 10 core eClass modules. Auto-formats content, applies warning tags, and lets you copy to clipboard in one click.
homePage.comingSoonTitle: AI Automated Canned Responses is coming soon...
homePage.comingSoonText: (In fact, your boyfriend is working hard coding this overnight 🧑‍💻)
homePage.card1Text: Turn confusing developer logs into polite, clear public announcements with just one click. No more scratching your head over copywriting!
homePage.card2Text: I've listed all the environment checks (IP vs. EJ) for you. Never worry about deployment misfires or tiny mistakes again!
homePage.card3Text: Just paste the messy raw path block, and I will automatically organize it into clean Web and App fields with perfect prefixes!
homePage.sectionTitle: ✨ How I Can Help You Today

upgradeNews.title: eClass Upgrade News Assistant
upgradeNews.remarksLabel: Internal Remarks Only (e.g., Case Ticket IDs)
upgradeNews.pathSmartPlaceholder:
Paste standard path block here. e.g.,
Web Usage Path: Student Management > Announcement System
eClass Teacher App Usage Path: Student Announcement > top-right filter
upgradeNews.warningModalBody: Please review the following unchecked items:

items.checkEJ: Primary School System (EJ) deployment status checked?
items.checkFlow: Web/Computer flow tested and fully functional?
items.checkMobile: Mobile App flow tested and functional?
items.checkProgrammer: If function failed, fixed by Programmer already?
items.checkTickets: Client suggestions and Case Tickets solved?
